title: The Textiles Committee Act, 1963
full_text: The Textiles Committee Act, 1963 टेक्‍सटाइल समिति अधिनियम, 1963 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196341 Act Number: 41 Enactment Date: 1963-12-03 Act Year: 1963 Short Title: The Textiles Committee Act, 1963 Hindi Title: टेक्‍सटाइल समिति अधिनियम, 1963 Long Title: An Act to provide for the establishment of a Committee for ensuring the quality of textiles and textile machinery and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Textiles Enforcement Date: 22-08-1964 Notification: 22nd August, 1964, vide notification No. S.O. 2913(E), dated the 22nd August, 1964, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Textiles Committee Act, 1963 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Show Related Subordinates Section 2A. Construction of references to any law not in force, or any functionary not in existence, in the State of Jammu and Kashmir. Section 3. Establishment of Textiles Committee. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Functions of the Committee. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Powers of the Committee. Show Related Subordinates Section 5A. Imposition of cess on textiles and textile machinery manufactured in India. Show Related Subordinates Section 5B. Constitution of Tribunal. Section 5C. Hearing of appeals by Tribunal. Section 5D. Recovery of duty of excise. Show Related Subordinates Section 5E. Power to exempt. Show Related Subordinates Section 5F. Payment of proceeds of cess to the Committee. Section 6. Grants by Central Government to the Committee. Show Related Subordinates Section 7. Constitution of Fund. Section 8. Standing or ad hoc Committee. Show Related Subordinates Section 9. Officers and other employees of the Committee. Show Related Subordinates Section 10. Transfer of service of existing employees to the Committee. Section 11. Inspection. Section 12. Levy of fees for inspection and examination. Show Related Subordinates Section 13. Accounts and audit. Show Related Subordinates Section 14. Delegation of powers and duties. Section 15. Acts or proceedings of Committee not to be invalidated. Section 16. Officers and employees of the Committee to be public servants. Section 17. Power to prohibit exports and internal marketing of textiles and textile machinery. Section 18. Offences by companies. Section 19. Procedure for prosecution. Section 20. Jurisdiction of courts. Section 21. Protection of action taken under the Act. Section 22. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 23. Power to make regulations. Show Related Subordinates Section 24. Repeal and Saving.
